lbl.why_order: Why are mods installed in this order?
search.name: Search mod names... ( / )
filter.standalone_tip: Hide EET-required mods — for iOS, Android, or standalone BG:EE / BG2:EE play
filter.active_tip: Hide dormant (3-5yr), archived, and abandoned (5+ yr) mods
modal.shared_msg: URL updated with your selection. Share this link:
modal.shared_note: Anyone who opens this URL will see your exact mod selection.
cat_desc.PRE EET BGEE MODS: Mods installed on BG1:EE before the EET merge. Must go on your BG1 game folder first.
cat_desc.EET STARTS HERE: The EET core mod that merges BG1 into BG2. Everything after this installs on the merged game.
cat_desc.ENGINE: Engine-level modifications (EEex). These extend what other mods can do.
cat_desc.INTERFACE: UI overhauls and tweaks. Only pick ONE major UI overhaul.
cat_desc.GRAPHICS: Visual replacements. Higher quality textures, area graphics, and paperdoll overhauls.
cat_desc.RESTORATIONS: Content cut from the original games, restored by modders.
cat_desc.QUEST MODS BG1: New quests and content for the Baldur's Gate 1 portion.
cat_desc.QUEST MODS BG2: New quests and content for Shadows of Amn.
cat_desc.QUEST MODS ToB: New quests and content for Throne of Bhaal.
cat_desc.NEW NPC MODS: New companion characters with their own stories and dialogue.
cat_desc.NPC EXPANSIONS: Mods that expand existing or new NPCs. Install after NPC mods.
cat_desc.CREATURE MODS: Changes to enemy creatures and encounters. Install before tactical mods.
cat_desc.EXPERIENCE TWEAKS: XP gain adjustments and level scaling modifications.
cat_desc.ITEM ADDITION MODS: New items, weapons, armor, and equipment.
cat_desc.SPELL MODS: New spells, spell changes, and magic system modifications.
cat_desc.KIT & CLASS MODS: New character kits, classes, and class modifications.
cat_desc.PRE-TACTICAL TWEAKS: General tweaks that should be installed before SCS and other tactical mods.
cat_desc.TACTICAL MODS: Sword Coast Stratagems, Tactics Remix, The Crucible, and other AI/encounter overhauls.
cat_desc.POST-TACTICAL TWEAKS: Final tweaks, scripts, and patches. Install after tactical mods.
cat_desc.NPC CUSTOMIZATION: NPC stat, class, kit, and appearance customization. Install after all rule changes are finalized.
cat_desc.POST-TACTICAL QUESTS: Large quest and campaign mods that patch spells or need all other content in place first.
cat_desc.MUSIC & AUDIO: Voice packs, soundsets, and music mods. Install late so they overwrite any earlier sound changes.
cat_desc.NPC CROSSMOD: Cross-mod banter and romance packs that add interactions between NPCs from different mods.
cat_desc.PORTRAITS: Portrait packs install last because they overwrite NPC portrait files. Purely cosmetic.
cat_desc.EET FINALIZATION: EET End — the final step. Must be installed after ALL other mods to finalize the EET merge.
cat_desc.POST EET: Mods installed after EET_End. GUI replacements, engine-level scripts, biffing, and other tools that must come last.

start.browse_desc: Use the Categories in the sidebar, search bar, or select a preset to explore the full mod catalog.
start.desc: Choose a preset from the sidebar to start with a curated mod list, or browse categories to build your own. You can also drag-and-drop a WeiDU.log to import an existing install.
start.title: Getting Started
